evals.name: db-module-creation
evals.prompt: use the yolo-api-data-layer skill to refactor the api to work with sqlalchemy
evals.expected_output: Creates services/yolo/db.py with SQLAlchemy engine, SessionLocal, Base, and get_db() dependency injection function for FastAPI. Supports both SQLite (default) and PostgreSQL via DB_URL environment variable.
assertions: File services/yolo/db.py is created
Imports SQLAlchemy: create_engine, sessionmaker, declarative_base
Reads DB_URL from environment with default 'sqlite:///./predictions.db'
Creates SQLite engine with 'check_same_thread': False in connect_args
Creates SessionLocal with sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)
Defines Base = declarative_base() for model inheritance
Defines get_db() generator function that yields db session
get_db() closes session in finally block for proper cleanup
No hardcoded database paths - uses environment variable
Supports both SQLite and PostgreSQL connection strings

evals.name: models-module-creation
evals.prompt: use the yolo-api-data-layer skill to refactor the api to work with sqlalchemy
evals.expected_output: Creates services/yolo/models.py defining PredictionSession and DetectionObject ORM models that map to database tables with proper relationships, constraints, and indices for query optimization.
assertions: File services/yolo/models.py is created
PredictionSession class inherits from Base
PredictionSession has __tablename__ = 'prediction_sessions'
PredictionSession.uid is String column with primary_key=True
PredictionSession.timestamp is DateTime column with UTC default
PredictionSession has original_image and predicted_image String columns
PredictionSession defines relationship to DetectionObject
DetectionObject class inherits from Base
DetectionObject has __tablename__ = 'detection_objects'
DetectionObject.id is Integer column with primary_key=True and autoincrement
DetectionObject.prediction_uid is String with ForeignKey to prediction_sessions.uid
DetectionObject has label, score, and box columns with appropriate types
DetectionObject defines back_populates relationship to PredictionSession
DetectionObject has indices on prediction_uid, label, and score columns
No raw SQL CREATE TABLE statements - pure ORM declarative syntax

evals.name: app-imports-and-db-init
evals.prompt: use the yolo-api-data-layer skill to refactor the api to work with sqlalchemy
evals.expected_output: Updates services/yolo/app.py to remove sqlite3 dependency and import SQLAlchemy modules, models, and database configuration. Replaces init_db() SQL with Base.metadata.create_all().
assertions: Does NOT import sqlite3 module
Adds 'from sqlalchemy.orm import Session' to imports
Adds 'Depends' to FastAPI imports
Imports 'from db import engine, Base, get_db'
Imports 'from models import PredictionSession, DetectionObject'
Removes DB_PATH global variable
Removes init_db() function definition with raw SQL CREATE TABLE
Replaces init_db() call with Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
Keeps all other business logic unchanged (YOLO model, file handling, etc)
No hardcoded SQL strings in app.py

evals.name: endpoint-dependency-injection
evals.prompt: use the yolo-api-data-layer skill to refactor the api to work with sqlalchemy
evals.expected_output: All database endpoints in services/yolo/app.py accept db: Session = Depends(get_db) parameter for dependency injection instead of creating database connections inside the handler.
assertions: POST /predict endpoint signature includes db: Session = Depends(get_db)
GET /prediction/{uid} endpoint signature includes db: Session = Depends(get_db)
GET /prediction/{uid}/image endpoint signature includes db: Session = Depends(get_db)
GET /predictions/label/{label} endpoint signature includes db: Session = Depends(get_db)
GET /predictions/score/{min_score} endpoint signature includes db: Session = Depends(get_db)
No sqlite3.connect() calls exist anywhere in endpoint implementations
No try/except with sqlite3.connect in finally blocks
save_prediction_session() helper accepts db: Session as first parameter
save_detection_object() helper accepts db: Session as first parameter
Endpoints call helpers with db parameter: save_prediction_session(db, ...)

evals.name: database-operations-orm-transformation
evals.prompt: use the yolo-api-data-layer skill to refactor the api to work with sqlalchemy
evals.expected_output: All database operations in services/yolo/app.py use SQLAlchemy ORM queries instead of raw SQL. Object data accessed via dot notation. Relationships use ORM attributes instead of manual JOINs.
assertions: save_prediction_session() creates PredictionSession ORM instance
save_prediction_session() uses db.add(session) and db.commit()
save_detection_object() creates DetectionObject ORM instance
save_detection_object() uses db.add(obj) and db.commit()
SELECT queries use db.query(PredictionSession).filter_by(...).first()
SELECT queries use db.query(DetectionObject).filter_by(...).all()
No raw SQL strings like 'SELECT * FROM' in app.py
No row['column'] dict-style access - uses obj.column attribute access
get_prediction_by_uid uses session.detection_objects relationship instead of JOIN
get_predictions_by_label uses db.query().join() with filter instead of manual JOIN query
Access to ORM objects uses attributes: session.uid, obj.label, obj.score
No conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row pattern

evals.name: test-fixtures-file-based-database
evals.prompt: use the yolo-api-data-layer skill to refactor the api to work with sqlalchemy
evals.expected_output: Test fixtures in services/yolo/tests/test_api.py use file-based SQLite database (not in-memory) to enable proper TestClient thread sharing. All fixtures depend on a single test_engine to prevent database isolation bugs.
assertions: test_engine fixture exists with function scope
test_engine uses tempfile.mkstemp() to create temporary database file
test_engine creates engine with f'sqlite:///{db_path}' URL (file-based, not :memory:)
test_engine sets 'check_same_thread': False in connect_args
test_engine calls Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
test_engine yields engine for other fixtures to use
test_engine cleans up with Base.metadata.drop_all() and os.unlink()
setup_db fixture has autouse=True
setup_db(test_engine) depends on test_engine parameter
setup_db creates TestingSessionLocal from test_engine (shared database)
setup_db overrides app.dependency_overrides[get_db] with test session factory
setup_db clears overrides after test with app.dependency_overrides.clear()
db_session fixture depends on test_engine parameter
db_session(test_engine) creates session from same engine as setup_db
No create_engine() calls inside test functions - only via fixtures
No use of sqlite:///:memory: in test code
TestClient uses app with injected test database via dependency_overrides

evals.name: test-orm-access-patterns
evals.prompt: use the yolo-api-data-layer skill to refactor the api to work with sqlalchemy
evals.expected_output: Test code in services/yolo/tests/test_api.py uses ORM for all database operations. Imports ORM models and get_db. Helper functions accept db: Session and use ORM. Assertions access object attributes not dict keys.
assertions: Imports get_db from app module
Imports PredictionSession and DetectionObject from models module
Imports Base from db module
Does NOT import sqlite3
save_prediction_session(db, ...) helper accepts db: Session parameter
save_prediction_session helper creates PredictionSession() ORM instance
save_prediction_session helper uses db.add(session) and db.commit()
save_detection_object(db, ...) helper accepts db: Session parameter
save_detection_object helper creates DetectionObject() ORM instance
Test assertions use db.query(PredictionSession).filter_by(...).first()
Test assertions access row.uid not row['uid']
Test assertions access obj.label not obj['label']
Test assertions access obj.score not obj['score']
No direct sqlite3.connect() in test implementations
Tests that seed data pass db_session fixture to helper functions

evals.name: api-contracts-preserved
evals.prompt: use the yolo-api-data-layer skill to refactor the api to work with sqlalchemy
evals.expected_output: All HTTP API contracts remain unchanged after SQLAlchemy migration. Routes, methods, status codes, response schemas, and validation remain identical to original sqlite3 version.
assertions: POST /predict endpoint exists with YoloPredictResponse model
YoloPredictResponse has fields: prediction_uid, detection_count, labels, time_took
GET /prediction/{uid} endpoint returns correct response structure
GET /prediction/{uid}/image endpoint returns FileResponse
GET /predictions/label/{label} endpoint returns list of predictions
GET /predictions/score/{min_score} endpoint returns list of detection objects
GET /health endpoint returns {'status': 'ok'}
GET /ready endpoint returns {'status': 'ready'}
POST /predict returns status 200 on success
POST /predict returns status 400 for invalid file extension
GET /prediction/{uid} returns status 404 when prediction not found
GET /prediction/{uid}/image returns status 404 when image not found
GET /predictions/label/{label} returns status 400 for empty label
GET /predictions/score/{min_score} returns status 400 for score out of bounds (0.0-1.0)
GET /ready returns status 503 when is_shutting_down is True
All validation rules preserved from original: label.strip(), min_score bounds check
YOLO model inference logic unchanged: model(image_path, device='cpu', conf=CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD)
CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD environment variable handling preserved
Image file processing logic unchanged

evals.name: predict-endpoint-orm-integration
evals.prompt: Write reliable tests for POST /predict after the SQLAlchemy refactor. Tests must not load the real YOLO model and must not touch a developer database.
evals.expected_output: The POST /predict endpoint is fully integrated with SQLAlchemy ORM, accepting a db session via FastAPI dependency injection, storing prediction and detection data in test database, and mocking only the YOLO model boundary.
assertions: Uses FastAPI TestClient to call POST /predict
Mocks YOLO model instead of loading real model (yolov8n.pt)
Injects isolated test database via app.dependency_overrides[get_db]
Does NOT create or read real predictions.db file
Calls save_prediction_session(db, uid, original_path, predicted_path) with injected db
Calls save_detection_object(db, uid, label, score, bbox) for each detected object
Saves PredictionSession and DetectionObject records to test database
Test assertions read back data using db.query(PredictionSession).filter_by(uid=...).first()
Test assertions verify detection_objects relationship populated correctly
Mocked model.names dict contains labels
Mocked box.cls, box.conf, box.xyxy tensors return expected values
Test passes with only YOLO model mocked - real database and filesystem not involved in data validation

evals.name: no-sqlite3-raw-sql-anywhere
evals.prompt: use the yolo-api-data-layer skill to refactor the api to work with sqlalchemy
evals.expected_output: No raw SQL strings or sqlite3 module usage remains anywhere in the refactored codebase. All database operations go through SQLAlchemy ORM.
assertions: No 'import sqlite3' in app.py
No 'import sqlite3' in tests/test_api.py
No sqlite3.connect() calls anywhere
No 'SELECT * FROM' or similar raw SQL strings in app.py
No 'INSERT INTO' or similar raw SQL strings in app.py
No conn.execute() calls with SQL strings
No conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
No CREATE TABLE statements with raw SQL
No string interpolation like f'SELECT ... WHERE uid = {uid}'
All queries use db.query() ORM interface
All inserts use db.add() and db.commit()
Database initialization uses Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
grep 'sqlite3' on services/yolo/app.py returns no results
grep 'sqlite3' on services/yolo/tests/test_api.py returns no results
grep 'SELECT' on services/yolo/app.py returns no results (no raw SQL)
grep 'INSERT' on services/yolo/app.py returns no results (no raw SQL)
